title: Shravan <> Darshan
summary: Darshan is preparing a presentation for April 15th but needs financing numbers to complete it. There are issues with channel numbers that require verification with AJ before proceeding. A 15-minute follow-up meeting is tentatively scheduled for April 17th at 10:00 a.m. to discuss any outstanding items.
